Install behaviortree-cpp via vcpkg

git clone https://github.com/Microsoft/vcpkg.git
cd vcpkg
./bootstrap-vcpkg.sh
./vcpkg integrate install
./vcpkg install behaviortree-cpp 

Version 4.9.0 used

The built `behaviortree-cpp_x64-windows" folder is copied into externals, and the minitrace, and tinyxml2 dlls added as well to allow for linking.
